title: RegionViewDistance
description: A simple PaperMC plugin that adds new view distance flags to WorldGuard
body:
# Region View Distance
A simple plugin that allows you to modify a player view-distance and simulation-distance in WorldGuard regions.

# Features
- Allows you to set the players server view distance to the same as the player's client
- Adds a new view-distance flag to WorldGuard.
- Adds a new simulation-distance flag to WorldGuard.

## Requires PaperMC (or other forks) and WorldGuard!
